# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes.

## Function — what this contribution does

Check all that apply.

- [ ] **Propose** — introduce a new idea, mechanism, principle, or framing
- [ ] **Critique** — challenge or refine an existing claim
- [ ] **Evidence** — supply data, sources, or analysis
- [ ] **Build** — code, simulation, tool, artifact
- [ ] **Translate** — language, register, or cultural tradition
- [ ] **Witness** — lived testimony, case study, observed effect
- [ ] **Organize** — event, reading group, real-world action
- [ ] **Index** — register an externally hosted work in `INDEX.md`
- [ ] **Steward** — improve the project's own form (governance, contribution model, structure)

## Form — what this contribution is, materially

For example: essay, code, design proposal, threat model, translation, art, scenario, index entry. This list is open.

## Layer

- [ ] Canon (manifesto, core principles, accepted governance rules)
- [ ] Draft (serious but non-canonical)
- [ ] RFC (formal proposal for major change)
- [ ] Experiment (technical prototype, simulation, agent system)
- [ ] Repository infrastructure (docs, templates, tooling)
- [ ] Not sure

## Locus

- [ ] In-repo (this PR commits the artifact here)
- [ ] Indexed-external (adds an entry to `INDEX.md` for a work hosted elsewhere)
- [ ] Mixed (commits some material here, links to external work)

## Claim type

Does this PR introduce or modify any of the following?

- [ ] Normative claim about rights, dignity, agency, justice, or legitimacy
- [ ] Empirical claim about the world, AI, economics, safety, or institutions
- [ ] Design claim about mechanisms, protocols, agents, taxation, or governance
- [ ] No major claims introduced

## Evidence and reasoning

If this PR includes empirical or design claims, summarize the evidence, reasoning, or model behind them.

## Risks and objections

What are the strongest objections to this PR?

What could go wrong if this change is accepted?

## Safety and dual-use review

- [ ] This PR has no known safety or dual-use implications.
- [ ] This PR may have safety or dual-use implications, described below.
- [ ] This PR should receive safety review before merge.

Details:

## Governance and project-form impact

- [ ] No effect on governance, contribution model, or project shape
- [ ] Modifies governance (who decides, how)
- [ ] Modifies contribution model (functions, forms, layers, locus, INDEX schema)
- [ ] Modifies project shape (layers, repo layout, naming, scope)

Details:

## Translation impact

Does this PR affect translated or localized content?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Not sure

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I have read `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`.
- [ ] I have read `SECURITY.md`.
- [ ] This PR is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] I have marked whether it affects canon.
- [ ] I have included evidence or uncertainty for empirical claims.
- [ ] I have discussed risks for mechanism or governance proposals.
- [ ] I have the right to submit all content included in this PR.
